title: Posthumous portrait of Raja Chhatar Singh of Chamba smoking a hookah with his brother and son
medium: Gum tempera and ink on paper
creditLine: Cleveland Museum of Art. Mr. and Mrs. William H. Marlatt Fund
tags: Raja Smoking a Hookah with His Son and a Courtier
Raja Chattar Singh of Chamba (reigned 1664–90) smoking a hookah with prince and courtier
Posthumous portrait of Rāja Chhattar Singh of Chambā (reigned 1664–90) smoking a hookah with his brother Jai Singh (died 1696) and son Udai Singh (reigned 1690–1720)
Posthumous portrait of Raja Chhatar Singh of Chamba smoking a hookah with his brother and son Udai Singh
